#{{adminUser().vendorRoleName}}
Vendor User Id {{ adminUser().vendorUserId }}
User Id {{ adminUser().userId }}
First Name {{adminUser().firstName}}
Last Name {{adminUser().lastName}}
Name {{adminUser().firstName + ' ' + adminUser().lastName}}
Role {{adminUser().vendorRoleName}}
Email {{adminUser().email}}
Phone {{adminUser().phoneNumber}}
Status @if (adminUser().isActive) { Active } @else { Inactive }
Created Date {{ adminUser().createdAt | date:'dd MMM yyyy, hh:mm a' }}
